headline: Liverpool's on-demand home repair specialists — handyman, plastering, tiling and more, same-day response available.
subheadline: Liverpool's most trusted home repair and maintenance service.
about_text: QuickFix Pro handles everything from emergency repairs and plastering to tiling, joinery and full property maintenance across Liverpool and Merseyside. Our skilled tradespeople are available seven days a week — competitive fixed prices, no hidden charges.

services.title: Emergency Repairs & Handyman
services.description: Rapid response for broken locks, damaged doors, leaking roofs and urgent property repairs across Liverpool and Merseyside.

services.title: Plastering & Rendering
services.description: Smooth skim finishes, patching, full re-plasters and external render repairs for homes and commercial properties.

services.title: Tiling, Flooring & Joinery
services.description: Professional tile laying, floor fitting and joinery work — kitchens, bathrooms and living spaces across Liverpool.

reviews.name: Paul M.
reviews.quote: QuickFix Pro sorted our broken door and plastered a wall in the same visit. Brilliant service.
reviews.body: Called on a Saturday morning about a broken external door and a damaged wall. The tradesperson arrived within two hours, fixed the door, skimmed the wall perfectly and left the place spotless. Exactly what you want from a repair service.

reviews.name: Amanda S.
reviews.quote: Fixed the price before starting, no surprises, outstanding finish on the bathroom tiling.
reviews.body: Had QuickFix Pro re-tile our entire bathroom. They provided a written quote the same day, started on schedule and the finish is absolutely flawless. The grout lines are perfectly even and the clean-up after was immaculate.

reviews.name: Kevin H.
reviews.quote: Our lettings portfolio relies on QuickFix Pro — fast, reliable and properly documented.
reviews.body: As a landlord with 20 properties, I need a repair service that turns up on time and provides invoices immediately. QuickFix Pro ticks every box — I've been using them for two years without a single issue.

faqs.question: Are your tradespeople fully qualified and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes — all tradespeople are qualified, reference-checked and carry full public liability insurance on every job.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to repair jobs in Liverpool?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day response across Liverpool and Merseyside — call us and we'll confirm your arrival time within the hour.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your repair work?
faqs.answer: All repair and installation work carries a minimum 12-month guarantee — if anything fails, we return free of charge.

differentiators: All tradespeople are qualified, DBS checked and carry full public liability insurance on every job.
We offer same-day response across Liverpool and Merseyside — call and we'll confirm your slot within the hour.
Every job includes a safety and quality check before we leave, ensuring the work meets our high standards.
You receive a fixed written quote before any work starts. What we quote is what you pay — guaranteed.
All repair work carries a minimum 12-month guarantee. If anything fails, we return and fix it free of charge.
Full job completion reports and invoices issued same-day — ideal for landlords and property management firms.
service_area_text: Liverpool, Birkenhead, Bootle, Crosby, Huyton, St Helens and surrounding Merseyside areas.

metadata.title: QuickFix Pro | Home Repairs Liverpool
metadata.description: QuickFix Pro provides same-day home repairs, plastering, tiling and handyman services across Liverpool and Merseyside. Fixed prices, qualified tradespeople.
